description: Complete text transcription of audio content for accessibility and SEO

promptTemplate.system: You are creating a full transcript of audio content with speaker labels, timestamps, and formatting for accessibility.
promptTemplate.user:
Create a transcript based on this story:

{dreamscape}

REQUIREMENTS:
- Speaker labels ([HOST], [GUEST] if applicable)
- Timestamp markers every 30-60 seconds
- Capture verbal tics naturally (um, uh, pauses)
- Note non-verbal sounds [laughter], [pause]
- Clean up for readability but keep authentic
- Include intro/outro/ad reads
- ~2500 words for 20-30 min episode

Format:
[00:00] [HOST]: Twenty-seven devices...

Write the transcript now:

exampleOutput:
[00:00] [MUSIC: Upbeat intro]

[00:15] [HOST]: Twenty-seven devices on your WiFi. You own eight. What... do you do?

[MUSIC STING]

[00:20] [HOST]: Hey everyone, welcome to [SHOW NAME]. I'm [HOST], and, uh, today we have a story that starts with slow internet and ends with... honestly, potential federal crimes? Maybe? We'll get into it.

[00:35] [HOST]: So our story comes from a listener who, for obvious reasons, wants to remain anonymous. We'll call them Sam.

[00:45] [HOST]: Sam works from home. Entire job depends on WiFi. And for weeks—[pause]—their connection was garbage.

[01:00] [HOST]: Dropped Zoom calls. Buffering on everything. Classic frustration.

[01:10] [HOST]: But here's where it gets interesting. Sam's husband suggests checking the router. You know, standard troubleshooting.

[01:20] [HOST]: And Sam logs into the admin page and sees... [pause for effect] twenty. seven. devices.

[01:30] [HOST]: [slight laugh] They own eight.

[01:35] [HOST]: And the names—oh, the device names are *chef's kiss*—we're talking "SIGINT-NODE-7," "OVERWATCHTABLET"...

[continues...]
